task_description: Consensus plan for The Rullet mono mobile redesign consult
decision_in_progress: Recommend differentiating via mono utility framing, reduced motion, and card-led mobile shell rather than clone-like game presentation
approved_option: Option A - Mono Control-First Utility Shell
decision: Option A mono control-first utility shell
key_clarification: Need spec to explicitly decide contained-vs-fullscreen canvas behavior because current CSS keeps canvas full-screen in draw and result modes
recommended_direction: Option A - mono control-first utility shell
must_keep_guardrails: No coding before Spec Gate + Design Gate
Stay mono with at most one restrained accent
Explicitly decide canvas containment in spec
